languages.text: [Картинно прислушаться к Нунциусу] "Что-что? Ты считаешь, что почтенные магосы ведут себя как дети малые? Да, я соглас{mf|ен|на}".
[Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."
languages.original_text: [Картинно прислушаться к Нунциусу] "Что-что? Ты считаешь, что почтенные магосы ведут себя как дети малые? Да, я соглас{mf|ен|на}".

traits.locale_text: [Ostentatiously listen to Nuntius] "What's that? You think the esteemed magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."
[Ostentatiously listen to Nuntius] "What's that? You think the esteemed magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."
[Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."
[Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."
[Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."
[Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."

languages.text: [Nuncius demonstrativ zuhören] "War's das? Ihr findet, die geschätzten Magi verhalten sich wie zankende Kinder? Ja, dem würde ich zustimmen."
languages.original_text: [Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."

traits.locale_text: [Nuncius demonstrativ zuhören] "War's das? Ihr findet, die geschätzten Magi verhalten sich wie zankende Kinder? Ja, dem würde ich zustimmen."

languages.text: [Faire semblant d'écouter attentivement Nuncius] « Comment ? Vous pensez que ces honorables Magos se chamaillent tels des enfants ? Oui, je dois dire que je suis assez d'accord. »
languages.original_text: [Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."

traits.locale_text: [Faire semblant d'écouter attentivement Nuncius] « Comment ? Vous pensez que ces honorables Magos se chamaillent tels des enfants ? Oui, je dois dire que je suis assez d'accord. »

languages.text: 【煞有介事地倾听努恩修斯】“什么？你觉得尊敬的贤者们表现得像是吵架的小孩？没错，我深有同感。”
languages.original_text: [Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."

traits.locale_text: 【煞有介事地倾听努恩修斯】“什么？你觉得尊敬的贤者们表现得像是吵架的小孩？没错，我深有同感。”

languages.text: [Escuchar ostentosamente a Nuncius] «¿Cómo dice? ¿Que los estimados magos se están comportando como niños pequeños? Sí, estoy de acuerdo».
languages.original_text: [Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."

traits.locale_text: [Escuchar ostentosamente a Nuncius] «¿Cómo dice? ¿Que los estimados magos se están comportando como niños pequeños? Sí, estoy de acuerdo».

languages.text: [仰々しくヌンシウスに耳を傾ける]。尊敬するマギたちが、いがみ合う子供のように振る舞っていると？ええ、私もそう思います。"
languages.original_text: [Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."

languages.text: [Gösterişli bir şekilde Nuncius'u dinle] "O da ne? Saygıdeğer Magosların tartışan çocuklar gibi davrandığını mı düşünüyorsun? Evet, sana katılmalıyım doğrusu."
languages.original_text: [Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."

traits.locale_text: [Gösterişli bir şekilde Nuncius'u dinle] "O da ne? Saygıdeğer Magosların tartışan çocuklar gibi davrandığını mı düşünüyorsun? Evet, sana katılmalıyım doğrusu."
